discrepancies.detail: Active skill has no Layer 2 section in docs/al-dev-skills-map.md. The skill is referenced in the /al-dev-ticket section as a deprecated alias, but has no dedicated ### /al-dev-support heading.
Active skill has no Layer 2 section in docs/al-dev-skills-map.md.
Active skill has no Layer 2 section in docs/al-dev-skills-map.md. The Layer 1 scope note mentions /plugin-health as a maintainer-only tool, but no Layer 2 drill-down section exists.
SKILL.md defines phases 1-4 (highest ## Phase N = 4); the Layer 2 Mermaid diagram shows Phase1, Phase2, Phase3 (highest PhaseN node = 3). Map is missing Phase 4 (Summary phase).

SKILL.md defines phases 0-7 (highest ## Phase N = 7); the Layer 2 Mermaid diagram shows Phase1, Phase2, Phase3 (highest PhaseN node = 3). Map shows phases 1-3 only; skill file has phases 0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 1.6, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7.
SKILL.md defines phases 1, 1.5, 2, 3 (highest ## Phase N = 3); the Layer 2 Mermaid diagram shows Phase1, Phase2 (highest PhaseN node = 2). Map is missing Phase 3 (Present to User phase).

SKILL.md defines phases 1-6 using local numbering (highest ## Phase N = 6); the Layer 2 Mermaid diagram uses parent workflow numbering with nodes Phase5, Phase8, Phase85, Phase67, Phase9, Phase10 (highest = 10). The numbering schemes are incompatible: SKILL.md uses phases 1-6 locally, map uses phases 5-10 from the parent al-dev-develop context.

SKILL.md defines phases 0.5, 5, 6, 7, 8 (highest ## Phase N = 8); the Layer 2 Mermaid diagram shows Phase1F, Phase1S, Phase2S, Phase3S (highest PhaseN node = 3). Map shows a simplified two-mode flow; skill file has 8 phases including attachment download, mode branching, research, and reply drafting.

SKILL.md Phase 2 references al-dev-shared:al-dev-developer-traditional for autonomous compile-fix error correction, but this agent does not appear in the /al-dev-review-develop Layer 2 Mermaid diagram. The diagram shows only al-dev-security-reviewer, al-dev-expert-reviewer, and al-dev-performance-reviewer.

summary: 9 discrepancies found: 3 missing_from_map, 4 phase_count_mismatch, 1 phase_count_mismatch (numbering scheme conflict), 1 agent_name_mismatch.
